name: Quantity unit of measure—Leg 1
description: The unit in which both Total notional quantity—Leg 1 and Notional quantity—Leg 1 are expressed.
format: Applicable code in the ISO 20022 code set ExternalUnitOfMeasure1Code.
optionalityRules: Conditionally required where Total notional quantity—Leg 1 is reported as a value other than ‘all 9s’.
May be optionally reported if Total notional quantity—Leg 1 is reported as 'all 9s'.
Not reported for TERM, EROR, PRTO Action types.
valueRules: If reported, the value is a code in the ISO 20022 code set ExternalUnitOfMeasure1Code.
Reporting entities should report the code that most accurately describes the unit of measure for the particular commodity underlier quantity.
Specific codes are provided for environmental commodity units (MWHO, CEER, CLRT, ENVC), commodity index units (IPNT), equity index units (IPNT), and equity instrument units (SHAS).
